'''竏嘛-th-z-s''' ('''kavathzesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jewelry|jewelry]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jewelry|jewelry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘛-th-z-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavathzesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivathzesoko|thivathzesoko]] || [[word:jivathzesoko|jivathzesoko]] || [[word:shivathzesoko|shivathzesoko]] || [[word:kivathzesoko|kivathzesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvathzesoko|thuthuvathzesoko]] || [[word:jujuvathzesoko|jujuvathzesoko]] || [[word:shushuvathzesoko|shushuvathzesoko]] || [[word:kukuvathzesoko|kukuvathzesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvathzesoko|thuvathzesoko]] || [[word:juvathzesoko|juvathzesoko]] || [[word:shuvathzesoko|shuvathzesoko]] || [[word:kuvathzesoko|kuvathzesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvathzesoko|thuvathzesoko]] || [[word:juvathzesoko|juvathzesoko]] || [[word:shuvathzesoko|shuvathzesoko]] || [[word:kuvathzesoko|kuvathzesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovathzesoko|thovathzesoko]] || [[word:jovathzesoko|jovathzesoko]] || [[word:shovathzesoko|shovathzesoko]] || [[word:kovathzesoko|kovathzesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦvathzesoko|thﾃｦvathzesoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦvathzesoko|jﾃｦvathzesoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦvathzesoko|shﾃｦvathzesoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦvathzesoko|kﾃｦvathzesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavathzesoko|thavathzesoko]] || [[word:javathzesoko|javathzesoko]] || [[word:shavathzesoko|shavathzesoko]] || [[word:kavathzesoko|kavathzesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavathzesoko|thavathzesoko]] || [[word:javathzesoko|javathzesoko]] || [[word:shavathzesoko|shavathzesoko]] || [[word:kavathzesoko|kavathzesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
